text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity enlivened by the clean lines and the quiet anticipation of knowledge and discovery. The glass walls signal transparency, yet also provoke questions about the boundaries between observer and exhibit. Inside, the vibrant colors and talk of 'research' and 'innovation' awaken in me the philosopher’s drive to interrogate how we redefine ourselves in the presence of technology and collective inquiry. It feels both exhilarating and strangely humbling to stand at the threshold between what is known and all we have yet to learn.
